calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Nov-27-2012 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Nov-13-2012 Continued To Nov-27-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Sep-25-2012 Continued To Nov-13-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Bresler for Siu Ming Chan.

Mr. Bresler explained how title to the property was held and informed the Court that the Husband (Shiu Lai) passed away. The Court indicated that it would be helpful to find out what the position of the Mother is. The Petition for Spousal Property was continued to November 13, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for further declaration as to what the Parties intents are. The declaration is also to include/address passing of Mr. Lai.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Ruiz.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Sep-04-2012 Continued To Sep-25-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
